zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda d'Arderne於大約1347年出生在英國英格蘭爾阿爾德福德時，她的父親John de Arderne50歲，母親Ellen Wasteneys22歲。她於大約1359年與Robert de Legh II在英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於從1392年1月9日到1393年1月8日在英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda d'Arderne于大约1347年出生在英国英格兰爾阿爾德福德时，她的父亲John de Arderne50岁，母亲Ellen Wasteneys22岁。她于大约1359年与Robert de Legh II在英国英格兰爾阿德林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于从1392年1月9日到1393年1月8日在英国英格兰爾阿德林頓。

nameMeanings.name: d'Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Patrice, Jacques.
French and Walloon: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from the Ardennes, a forested plateau in northeastern France, Belgium (Wallonia), and Luxembourg.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from a place called Ardenne, for example in Charente-Maritime and Haute-Loire.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda d'Arderne was born about 1347, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Arderne, was 50 and her mother, Ellen Wasteneys, was 22. She married Robert de Legh II about 1359, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died from 9 January 1392 to 8 January 1393, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda d'Arderne est née environ 1347, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Arderne, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Ellen Wasteneys, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Legh II environ 1359, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée du 9 janvier 1392 au 8 janvier 1393, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda d'Arderne um 1347 in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Arderne 50 und ihre Mutter Ellen Wasteneys 22. Sie hat um 1359 in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Robert de Legh II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb von 9. Januar 1392 bis 8. Januar 1393 in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda d'Arderne è nata il circa 1347 nel Aldford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Arderne, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Ellen Wasteneys, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Legh II circa 1359, nel Adlington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì da 9 gennaio 1392 a 8 gennaio 1393, nel Adlington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda d'Arderneが約1347年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードで生まれた時，父John de Arderneは50歳，母Ellen Wasteneysは22歳であった。約1359年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンでRobert de Legh IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はから1392年1月9日まで1393年1月8日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda d'Arderne(이)가 대략 1347년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Arderne(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Wasteneys(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애들링턴에서 Robert de Legh II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1392년 1월 9일부터 1393년 1월 8일까지 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애들링턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda d'Arderne nasceu aproximadamente 1347, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Arderne, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Wasteneys, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Legh II aproximadamente 1359, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu de 9 de janeiro de 1392 a 8 de janeiro de 1393, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda d'Arderne родилась около 1347 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Arderne было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Wasteneys, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Legh II около 1359 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла с 9 января 1392 по 8 января 1393 в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Robert de Legh II aproximadamente 1359, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió desde 9 de enero de 1392 hasta 8 de enero de 1393, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
